name: Macaroon Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese, sugar, egg white, flour, and coconut extract until smooth. Stir in the flaked coconut. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the whole-wheat flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, cocoa powder, and baking powder.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy; add the baby-food prunes, buttermilk, and vanilla. Add the egg white mixture to the flour mixture and mix until blended. Stir in the chocolate chips and almonds.
4. Spread the batter in the prepared baking pan. Spread the macaroon topping over the brownie batter.
5. Bake 25 to 30 minutes. Let cool, on a wire rack.
Yield: 20 brownies
